problem id: 2630aaf8
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(2) AND NOT SHR(2)) XOR NOT SHL(6)

examples:
  10111000 -> 00111111
  11100111 -> 10111001
  10110010 -> 10111101
  10111001 -> 01111111
  00000110 -> 01100111
  11000110 -> 01110101
  11010101 -> 11111101
  00011111 -> 01000111
  01000011 -> 00110010
  00010111 -> 01100111

query: 11111010
predicted answer: 10111110
